nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"not exactly a bug but a missing feature with clusters, we can't drop text (nodes in general, I guess) directly into them.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain: not exactly a bug but a missing feature with clusters, we can't drop text (nodes in general, I guess) directly into them.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"cluster command on selected nodes should simply cluster, it's poor UX to select cluster with multiple selected nodes and it creates a new default one","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain: cluster command on selected nodes should simply cluster, it's poor UX to select cluster with multiple selected nodes and it creates a new default one
